subject: fix(pwa): resolve React hydration error #418 on mobile web
body:
Browser API calls in usePWAInstall useState initializers caused hydration
mismatch — SSR rendered with defaults ('unknown'/false) but client hydrated
with real values from navigator/window, making InstallPrompt render
differently on server vs client. Moved detectBrowser(), getIsStandalone(),
and consumeEarlyCapturedEvent() to useEffect with SSR-safe initial state.

Also fixed broken import (debugLog → debugAdd).

Tags: pwa, hydration, bugfix, mobile-web
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa
Semver: patch
